response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience including a current Staff role at re:cinq with hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, plus prior exposure to high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, the resume shows no explicit Python expertise (a must-have), and distributed systems depth is implied rather than demonstrated with concrete scale/reliability outcomes. Strong craftsmanship and TDD background fits the AI-code-review responsibility, but stakeholder management at staff scale and on-call/incident leadership are not evidenced.
strengths: Current Staff role with hands-on AI agent and MCP code-generation experience
Prior high-throughput micro-services work (millions of req/sec at Sociomantic)
Strong craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: Python not listed in skills despite being a must-have
Distributed systems depth and reliability/on-call experience not concretely demonstrated
Limited evidence of cross-functional stakeholder management at staff scope
